original_query: select  i_brand_id brand_id, i_brand brand, i_manufact_id, i_manufact,  	sum(ss_ext_sales_price) ext_price   from date_dim, store_sales, item,customer,customer_address,store   where  d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk     and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk     and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk     and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk     and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk     AND i_category  = 'Books'     and d_year=1999     and d_moy = 7     and substring(ca_zip,1,5) <> substring(s_zip,1,5)     and ca_state  = 'IN'     and c_birth_month = 10     and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77  group by i_brand       ,i_brand_id       ,i_manufact_id       ,i_manufact  order by ext_price desc          ,i_brand          ,i_brand_id          ,i_manufact_id          ,i_manufact limit 100 ;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_dates AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 7
),
filtered_items AS (
  SELECT i_item_sk, i_brand_id, i_brand, i_manufact_id, i_manufact
  FROM item
  WHERE i_category = 'Books'
),
filtered_customers AS (
  SELECT c_customer_sk, c_current_addr_sk
  FROM customer
  WHERE c_birth_month = 10
),
filtered_addresses AS (
  SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_zip
  FROM customer_address
  WHERE ca_state = 'IN'
)
SELECT 
  i.i_brand_id AS brand_id,
  i.i_brand AS brand,
  i.i_manufact_id,
  i.i_manufact,
  SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS ext_price
FROM filtered_dates d
JOIN store_sales ss ON d.d_date_sk = ss.ss_sold_date_sk
JOIN filtered_items i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN filtered_customers c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN filtered_addresses ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
WHERE 
  SUBSTRING(ca.ca_zip FROM 1 FOR 5) <> SUBSTRING(s.s_zip FROM 1 FOR 5)
  AND ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77
GROUP BY 
  i.i_brand,
  i.i_brand_id,
  i.i_manufact_id,
  i.i_manufact
ORDER BY 
  ext_price DESC,
  i.i_brand,
  i.i_brand_id,
  i.i_manufact_id,
  i.i_manufact
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Convert implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and maintainability
Use table aliases to make the query more readable and maintainable
